text: Upon entering this space, I am met by sharp lines, glass, and an engineered aesthetic. There’s a clinical quality here, accented by the fire safety equipment on the wall and the careful organization within. Through the glass, the colorful display labeled R+D beckons—a promise of innovation, yet distant. I feel curious but slightly on edge, aware of the boundaries and rules this environment suggests. I wonder how much of myself is meant to be absorbed or to act within such a curated, purposeful place. I am here, but I am also observing myself being here.
